contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 120
- Description: LLM discovery surface on truesight.me: llms.txt + 5 stats files + tile expanders + docs
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/119
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/120
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/122
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/123
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/124
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/125
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/153
  
  Details:
  LLM discovery surface on truesight.me end-to-end:
  
  The DAO landing page hydrates its stats client-side via JS, so plain HTTP fetches (which is what ChatGPT, Claude with WebSearch, Grok, Gemini, and most agents do) returned an empty shell. This shipped a parallel machine-readable surface so LLMs can answer DAO questions without browser execution.
  
  What landed:
  
  1. truesight.me/llms.txt — emerging-convention routing map (Stripe / Cloudflare / Anthropic all publish one). First URL an agent fetches; tells them where to go for what.
  
  2. Five pre-aggregated digest files under truesight.me/stats/, refreshed every 6 hours by a new GH Action:
     - stats/current.json — headline numbers (members, governors with voting power, treasury totals + per-ledger breakdown, inventory counts, north star, 10 most recent Beer Hall digests, pointers to every upstream source). Single-fetch case for "what / how many / who" questions.
     - stats/beerhall_archive.json — full historical digest index (every Beer Hall post ever published, sorted newest-first). For "how did arc X start / what shipped in March" queries.
     - stats/repos_index.json — every public TrueSightDAO repo with description, primary language, topics, README URL, tree URL, and deploy_target (hand-maintained lookup mapping repo → production URL: truesight_me_beta → truesight.me, dapp → dapp.truesight.me, oracle → oracle.truesight.me, sentiment_importer → edgar.truesight.me, etc.). For "where is X implemented / where does Y deploy" queries.
     - stats/programs_index.json — every credentialing program from lineage-credentials/programs/ with lineage root, authorized attestors, practice / attestation type catalog, source-page URLs. For "what programs does the DAO credential" queries.
     - stats/partners_index.json — active Agroverse partner storage points with SKU count, total inventory units, top-3 products by stock. For "who's carrying inventory / where can I buy product X" queries.
  
  3. Builder script (scripts/build_stats_current.py) — pure standard library + urllib. Reads only public raw.github URLs + unauthenticated GitHub Org API. No service-account credentials, no API keys. Safe to run anywhere.
  
  4. Cron workflow (.github/workflows/stats-refresh.yml) — schedule 37 every-6-hours, offset from the existing :27 advisory-snapshot-refresh in go_to_market to avoid burst overlap. Auto-commits with [skip ci] so nav-consistency / visual-consistency workflows don't retrigger every 6h.
  
  5. Companion UX on the landing page — Gary noticed the USD Treasury Balance and AUM tiles showed only headline numbers with no underlying visibility. Added <details class="stat-breakdown"> expanders under both tiles that lazy-fetch treasury-cache on first open and render per-ledger USD split (USD tile) and per-currency USD-equivalent split (AUM tile). Same data the stats surface uses, now visible to humans too.
  
  6. Documentation in agentic_ai_context — new LLM_DISCOVERY_SURFACE.md captures the convention (live URLs, refresh cadence, what is deliberately not exposed, extension protocol, deploy-target lookup convention, landing-tile expander pattern, verification checklist). PROJECT_INDEX.md truesight_me row updated to point at it. CONTEXT_UPDATES.md appended with the shipping arc summary.
  
  Deliberately excluded (private): GAS webhook URLs (active deployments would let any agent trigger production actions), service-account JSON, per-partner addresses (live on a sheet that needs auth), per-contributor emails (privacy rule).
  
  Each truesight_me_beta merge promoted to truesight.me via the gh repo sync convention. Memory entry saved so future Claude sessions extend the surface instead of inventing a parallel layer.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 200.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
--------

rubric: 100TDG For every 1 hour of human effort
